answer: The September 15, 2026 Florida purchase escrow disbursement reconciliation was overstated because the settlement_disbursement_recon_v3 pipeline joined party_identity_bridge by normalized_tax_id instead of closing_party_role_id. The bad key matched multiple buyer and seller roles within the same closing, duplicating escrow disbursements in the finance.disbursement_recon_daily view for Florida purchase closings under FNF National Title.

facts.affected_segment: Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title
facts.remediation: Switch the transform to closing_party_role_id, quarantine normalized_tax_id joins in reconciliation workloads, and backfill Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title
facts.root_cause: settlement_disbursement_recon_v3 joined party_identity_bridge by normalized_tax_id instead of closing_party_role_id, duplicating escrow disbursements
